project.name: tsnum / @sylphx/numpy
project.summary: TypeScript numerical computing library family around the @sylphx/numpy public API, with TypeScript, native, and WASM backend paths plus Python parity benchmark evidence.

surfaces.name: @sylphx/numpy
surfaces.description: Primary public npm package contract for NumPy-compatible TypeScript APIs.

surfaces.name: @sylphx/numpy-native
surfaces.description: Optional Rust/N-API native acceleration package for covered backend paths.

surfaces.name: @sylphx/numpy-wasm
surfaces.description: WASM backend package metadata and generated package surface.

surfaces.name: TypeScript implementation and backend contracts
surfaces.description: Public implementation source, operations, linear algebra, backend dispatch, and tests.

surfaces.name: README and package docs
surfaces.description: Public package positioning, installation boundary, examples, and parity status.

surfaces.name: Python parity launch contract
surfaces.description: Benchmark-gated launch contract and claim ladder for public parity/release claims.

surfaces.name: Generated Python parity report
surfaces.description: Generated benchmark evidence uploaded by CI as the python-parity-report artifact.

surfaces.name: CI
surfaces.description: macOS build, tests, Python parity benchmark, report freshness, project-control test, and GroundAtlas package dogfood.

surfaces.name: Release
surfaces.description: Manual parity-gated release workflow; publication remains blocked until release:preflight passes.

surfaces.name: Doctrine adapter manifest
surfaces.description: Sylphx Doctrine adapter and org-local governance catalog; not the vendor-neutral GroundAtlas default.

commands.name: install
commands.purpose: Install locked Bun workspace dependencies without lockfile drift.

commands.name: bench:python-parity
commands.purpose: Generate same-machine Python/NumPy parity benchmark evidence.

commands.name: test:project-control
commands.purpose: Verify neutral manifest, Doctrine adapter, CI gate, and release-publication boundary.

commands.name: groundatlas:fleet
commands.purpose: Prove the vendor-neutral manifest is selected and generated GroundAtlas files are navigation-only.

commands.name: release:readback
commands.purpose: Read back every public npm package version after a future parity-gated release.

adoption.notes: Vendor-neutral GroundAtlas manifest for project-control dogfooding. .doctrine/project.json remains the Sylphx Doctrine adapter and local governance catalog. Generated .groundatlas* reports are evidence/navigation only, not source of truth. npm publication remains intentionally blocked until release:preflight proves repeatable parity and release readback succeeds.
